ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship status of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the individual */,
  "wage_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wage class of the individual */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual's household */,
  "employment_status_history" TEXT /* Employment status history of the individual */,
  "income_history" TEXT /* Income history of the individual */,
  "highest_education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved by the individual */,
  "occupation_industry" TEXT /* Current occupation industry of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_wage_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("wage_class_id") REFERENCES wage_classes ("wage_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass (e.g., Self-emp-not-inc, Private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  "workclass_category" TEXT /* Category of the workclass (e.g., Management, Sales) */,
  "average_salary_range" TEXT /* Average salary range for each workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "education_level_category" TEXT /* Category of the education level (e.g., High School, College) */,
  "average_years_required" INTEGER /* Average years of education required for each level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married-civ-spouse, Divorced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "marital_status_category" TEXT /* Category of the marital status (e.g., Married, Single) */,
  "average_age" INTEGER /* Average age of individuals in each marital status group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Exec-managerial, Handlers-cleaners) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "occupation_category" TEXT /* Category of the occupation (e.g., Management, Sales) */,
  "average_salary_range" TEXT /* Average salary range for each occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status (e.g., Husband, Not-in-family) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship status */,
  "relationship_category" TEXT /* Category of the relationship status (e.g., Family, Non-Family) */,
  "average_age" INTEGER /* Average age of individuals in each relationship group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "race_category" TEXT /* Category of the race (e.g., Asian, African American) */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Population percentage of each race group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "sex_category" TEXT /* Category of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Population percentage of each sex group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country (e.g., United-States, Cuba) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "native_country_region" TEXT /* Region of the native country (e.g., North America, South America) */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Population percentage of each native country group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_classes" (
  "wage_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wage class */,
  "wage_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the wage class (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wage class */,
  "wage_class_category" TEXT /* Category of the wage class (e.g., Low, High) */,
  "average_salary_range" TEXT /* Average salary range for each wage class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the household */,
  "head_of_household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the household */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the household */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the household */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the household */,
  "household_income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the household */,
  "household_size_category" TEXT /* Category of the household size (e.g., Small, Large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household member */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "relationship_to_head" TEXT /* Relationship of the member to the head of the household (e.g., Spouse, Child) */,
  "move_in_date" TEXT /* Date the member moved into the household */,
  "move_out_date" TEXT /* Date the member moved out of the household */,
  "member_role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the household (e.g., Head, Dependent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_sources" (
  "income_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income source */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of income source (e.g., Salary, Dividends) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of income */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of income (e.g., Monthly, Yearly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the income source */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the income source */,
  "income_source_category" TEXT /* Category of the income source (e.g., Wages, Investments) */,
  "average_income_amount" INTEGER /* Average income amount for each income source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_sources_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
